text: S3 Select and Glacier Select @ mostsncnte. @ sarcan * S3 can store HUGE objects (up to 5TB) * You often want to retrieve the entire object e Retrieving a 5TB object .. takes time, uses 5TB ¢ Filtering at the client side doesn’t reduce this * S3/Glacier select let you use SQL-Like statements.. » .. to select part of the object, pre-filtered by S3 e CSV, JSON, Parquet, BZIP2 compression for CSV and JSON
